entry.title: Re: 过账期间在16的期末调整会计凭证疑问
entry.content: 我理解是进行总账科目层面的调整，那就是用app过账一般日记账分录；如果过账日期是2023年12月31日，是需要打开2023年的会计期间的。余额结转会自动完成。

entry.title: Re: SPRO-财务会计-资产会计-主数据屏幕布局-定义资产主数据的屏幕布局 ANLZ-IMKEY字段没有
entry.content:
2 steps config are required ,here is my proposal to resolve your problem : 

Step 1

SPRO - Asset Accounting : 

> Integration with general ledger accounting > Additional account assignment objects > Activate Account assignment objects

Active IMKEY 

Step 2 

SPRO-Financial Accounting-Asset Accounting-Master Data-Screen Layout-Define Screen Layout for Asset Master Data

Changing the screen layout rule for Logical field group 3 - Time Dependent Data 

Changing the screen layout rule for Logical field group 7 -  Real estate and similar rights 

After above 2 steps , Asset master creation screen can show Real Estate Key ( ANLZ-IMKEY)

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Client Error After Install
entry.content:
Hi Dear,

It seems your SLD Configuration has some issues.

  1. Go to the service manager.
  2. Settings
  3. Configure Security.
  4. System LandScape Directory
  5. After login check your server IP and other options.
  • Close firewall settings from that user's PC/laptop.
  • Open SAP Client, Run as Administrator.

Hope your issue will be solved.

entry.title: Reversal of departure from checkpoint for TM-EWM integration with TU in S/4HANA 2023 Release
entry.content:
Last minute change in supply chain execution, human error etc are inevitable. Till SAP S/4HANA 2023 release, it was not feasible to reverse the departure from checkpoint as stated in SAP note 3016022 and as depicted in below image.

SAP has removed this limitation in S/4HANA 2023 release and my present blog is to illustrate this new functionality.

Before I deep dive into the new feature of ‘Reversal of departure from checkpint’, I like to highlight that SAP provides 2 solutions for TM-EWM interation i) TM-EWM integration with EWM trasnsportation unit (TU) ii) Advanced shipping and receiving (ASR). If you want details of these solutions then refer my earlier blogs.

SAP has provided the capability to send LDAP message for ‘Reverse departure from checkpoint’ from transportation unit of EWM to freight order of TM as depicted in below image for TM-EWM integration with EWM TU.  

 

Event ‘Departure from checkpint’ has happened for TU 6100004205 at 18:25:10 on 25.02.2024 as depicted in below screenshot of EWM TU.

And the same is reflected in freight order as in below image.

Now TU is being set ‘ Reverse departure’ as in below image.

Subsequently the ‘Departure from checkpoint’ gets unset as shown in below image.

And the event ‘Departure’ also gets removed from freight order as shown in below image.

Note the pre-requisite configuration as in below image.

This new feature will be very useful for customers using TM-EWM integration with EWM TU for both deployments- embedded and decentralized.

This blog is based on my personal insights, observation, and tests in SAP S/4HANA 2023 release with embedded deployment. Will appreciate your views / comment and feedback.

entry.title: Re: IBP - Editable key figure only editable on lowest (ba...
entry.content:
@vincentveheyen,

Please check below code. This wasn't tested, but expected to be working well with my VBA confidence. Let me know if successful.

 

Private IBPAutomationObject As Object

Function IBPBeforeSend(callMode As String) As Boolean 
	If callMode = "SAVE" or callMode = "SIMULATE" or callMode = "CREATE_SIMULATION" Then 

		‘declare the variables 
		Dim loc As Integer 

		'show a message box if location not found in the workbook and stop the save
		
		On Error GoTo ErrorHandling:
			If IBPAutomationObject Is Nothing Then Set IBPAutomationObject =
			Application.COMAddIns("IBPXLClient.Connect").Object

		'Check if the cell includes the Location Id
		loc = Target.Formula2
		If InStr(1, loc, "=@ EPMOlapMemberO(""[LOCID].[].[") = 0 Then
			MsgBox "Keyfigure not editable without Location", vbOKOnly
			IBPBeforeSend = False
		Else
			IBPBeforeSend = True
		End If
	End If
End Function

 

Best Regards,

'Riyaz'

entry.title: Re: P&L statement accounts required to show in cashflow u...
entry.content:
@Prince_121083 

In DA if you need to access cashflow Accounts, you need to set the Account to the second hierarchy.

CONFIG.HIERARCHY =[d/Account].[h/HierarchyName2]

For reporting you could just create a calculated Account for NET profit by assigning it the top PL Account node and use this in CF hierarchy.

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 2
entry.content:

Bonus :

Query : I have used service.definition["@graphql"] to check whether it supports GraphQL.
However not sure how to generate it as the first end point

entry.title: Validation of Post and park option in App F0859
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2402, For application F0859(create supplier invoice) there is a request to cover the below scenarios :

Business Role 1 with F0859: In this role post button should not be available (only park) (this is achieved with note (2834732 - Restrict the authorization of users to post supplier invoices))

Business Role 2 with F0859 : In this role user is allowed to park and post but the condition is Document parked by user1 should not be allowed to post by user1.

To make possible scenario 2 : we have two options

1. To remove park option from the access - Is it technically possible ?

2. Can we have a validation in system (Document parked by user1 should not be allowed to post by user1) ?

Is there any other alternative option or can we achieve either of above option.

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning Groups
entry.content:
Hi Dear,

Usually, when we add UDF at the row level if there are existing UDFs containing FMS, we align the columns at the row level so it creates some issues. So keep that new column (UDF) at the end of the DN and if you want the data from Business Partner Master Data to Delivery Note pass Fms by query having the same CardCodes, for this you have to use OCRD, ODLN, and DLN1 tables.

Hope your issue will be resolved.

entry.title: Re: Why some values in program are automaticly increment?
entry.content:
It was solved.
It was happenning because of the variants.
It was protected at Goto-> Variants, so i cannot choose it GetVariant button on Selection-screen

entry.title: SAP B1 - Error in mutual linking. [Resources - Linked Item]
entry.content:
Hello,

We get the following error when updating our items linked to the source master data. Can you help me?

"Error in mutual linking. [Resources - Linked Item]"

entry.title: Re: Sustainability with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402
entry.content: Nice and useful overview! Maybe next time tag the post with 'sustainability', I came across this blog by chance.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 - Error in mutual linking. [Resources - Linked...
entry.content:
This error, "Error in mutual linking. [Resources - Linked Item]" in SAP Business One, occurs when there is a circular or recursive relationship between items or resources.

For example, if Item A is linked to Item B, and Item B is also linked back to Item A, this creates a circular reference that the system cannot resolve. Circular links like this can confuse the system and cause errors when trying to process or validate data.

To ensure data integrity and prevent confusion in the system, SAP Business One does not allow such circular relationships between items or resources. When the system detects this issue, it throws the "Error in mutual linking" to alert users to the circular reference.

The solution involves breaking the circular link by removing or changing the type of link between the items. This allows the system to process the data correctly and prevent future errors related to circular references.

entry.title: Re: CAP: Getting Enum Values from OData Service
entry.content:
Hi @steffen_weinstock,

thanks for your solution. However, the scripts in the repo for showing the Status name are no longer available. May I ask you to share the original files, please? >"<

entry.title: Authoring In-App Guided Tours for Connected Screens in SAP S4
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are authoring In-Application guided tours using SAP Companion for the SAP S4 application.

Following is an example of the guided tour we authored. We created the Guided Tour for the "Display Change Requests" Fiori app. We could add steps for various screen elements on this screen as you can see in the picture 01 below. 

Picture 01:

One of the steps on the above screen is to click the number hyperlink in the Change column (step 04). When I click it, the new screen appears as shown below, Picture 02. Now, on this new screen, we do not the see the Help icon, so cannot open the In-App Help widget. So we cannot add any bubble here. Any reason why this happens?

Picture 02:

Also, another question, user can click any hyperlink on the picture 01, but we cannot author guided tour content for all such possibilities. In this case, is there any best practice to create guided tours?

Please help.

entry.title: Looking Back at the Success of SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024
entry.content:
Last week, on February 17th, the SAP Inside Track Bengaluru once again proved its mettle as an unparalleled hub for knowledge sharing and networking. This event extended a warm welcome to over 1400 attendees, 120+ speakers & 30+ volunteers offering an enriched platform where learnings were amplified and connections were strengthened.. Personally, it's been the best SAP Inside Track that I've been a part of. This wouldn't have been possible without the hard work and dedication of everyone involved. In this blog post, I will share some of my personal highlights of the event while celebrating the team that made this successful event possible. So, let's get started.

Agenda Highlights

Our event took off with an energy-filled keynote from Sindhu Gangadharan (SVP & MD, SAP Labs India) which illuminated on the pivotal subjects of the SAP Community, Learning, Artificial Intelligence, and more. The event was nothing less than a feast for tech enthusiasts, featuring 56 deep-dive lecture sessions, ~120 speakers, 6 hands-on, and 3 interactive 'Ask Me Anything' booths. These sessions, running on eight parallel tracks, ensured a wide range of topics covered, providing a comprehensive learning experience for all the attendees. I was fortunate to lead the content team where I aided in strategizing and designing the content, working collaboratively with the team. We had 7 tracks of lecture sessions, covering SAP BTP, Application Development - SAP Build, CAP & RAP, Integration, Data Analytics, Automation, SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, SAP UI5, Fiori & Many other functional topics. Check out our agenda here: https://sitblrwebsite.vercel.app/


(Ask me Anything Strategy Corner)

Did I just miss mentioning the Artificial Intelligence?, it was intentional 😉, the highlight of this event is the Business AI, almost 25+ sessions from this event had the flavor of AI in it, in all the tracks. Let's talk about it next 🙂

Advent of AI Discovery Paths:

A significant highlight was the launch of an AI Discovery Paths - a personalized AI journey depending on the attendee’s role selection. This facilitated attendees to select a path best suited to their roles, be it developer, consultant, architect, product manager, or admin. We appreciate Peeyush Chaurasiya for designing this, and thanks to Sindhu Gangadharan for giving us the idea to try this at this event before launching it at the upcoming SAP DCOM.
Check them out here: https://sitblrwebsite.vercel.app/paths

SAP BTP at the Epicenter:


The SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) found significant prominence at this event. There were a total of 34 lecture sessions from SAP Employees, Customers & Partners on topics ranging from Application Development, Artificial intelligence, Automation, Integration and Data-to-Value, and also four hands-on practical interactions, and two specialized 'Ask Me Anything' booths that offered attendees valuable insights from SAP Product Experts. The BTP diamond game, held thrice for customers and partners, made its mark as an engaging highlight.

Feedback that Motivates:

The feedback from the attendees was overwhelmingly positive, clocking an impressive average of 4.56 out of 5 from over 300 entries across all the sessions. The AI sessions, specifically, garnered rave reviews. We also gathered the event experience feedback that received noteworthy scores, with an average feedback of 4.57 from about 200 entries. It was heartening to learn that many attendees found the event to be a valuable platform for learning about SAP BTP, AI, and SAP S/4HANA, among other trending topics, and wanted us to organize these events more often. Of course, there were a few requests for improvements which will definitely consider for the future but considering this as a free event.

Kudos to the Team:

The immense success of the event would not have been possible without the help of all our volunteers dedicated at every step. Their dedication and effort helped us execute one of the best SAP Inside Track events Bengaluru has ever seen. From content curation to track management, their invaluable assistance was present at every stage of the event. Check out this blog post from Shreshtha for more information: <Blog post in process>

Sponsors

A massive thank you to our sponsors, without whom the SAP Inside Track Bengaluru wouldn't have been possible. Their ample support, both financial and logistical, played a crucial part in the smooth running of the event. Not only did they provide us with the necessary backing to host a profuse range of sessions and interactive booths, but some also contributed their own expertise as speakers. Their support was invaluable in making this event a grand success, and we extend our heartfelt thanks to them all. (Primus Techsystems, S2 Integrators, SAP Concur & SAP Press).

Lastly, I want to express my sincere gratitude to Pushpendra Yadav for managing all logistics flawlessly, making the event a truly amazing experience, and Abhishek Chatterjee, the driving force behind this outstanding event. My appreciation extends to PVN Pavankumar for his invaluable support in strategising and reviewing the event’s content agenda. I would also like to express my deep gratitude toward Sindhu Gangadharan for her unwavering support to us in organizing these important events in this region.

 

(Mahesh, PVN Pavankumar, Pushpendra Yadav, Abhishek Chatterjee)

The End

To sum up, SAP Inside Track Bengaluru was more than just an event - It was a confluence of shared knowledge and networking, and fostering collaborative learning by brining together the SAP Community. I had a great time being part of the organizing & content team, which enabled me to learn to lot and of course the networking 😉 . Looking forward to the upcoming SAP Inside Tracks in this India

entry.title: Re: How to find if maintenance plan is active or inactive? plant wise
entry.content: Please suggest the t code

entry.title: Re: Consume OData service from On Premise in SAP Build
entry.content:
Hi Vipin,

Answer to your queries:

1) Once an OData API is available it can be consumed in SAP Build Process Automation or SAP Build Apps. It does not matter whether the OData API originates from On-premise or Cloud system, whether it is created from CAP or RAP or any other means.  

Some references: 

SAP Build Process Automation - my blog - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-build-process-automation-consume-an-odata-api-as-actions-using-a/ba-p/13575377

SAP Build Apps - https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/utilize-sap-build-for-low-code-no-code-applications-and-automations-for-citizen-developers/connecting-the-sap-sales-cloud-odata-api-with-sap-build-apps_dd144941-fae7-43d4-a5cb-4bcc95af3d43

2) Recently available "Environments" feature in SAP Build should address your need to have control at business unit level while using a single sub account.

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/environments

 

Regards,

Karthik

entry.title: Re: GST Tax Rate Decimals
entry.content:
Hi,

I don't think that there is specific setup of decimals for the Tax Rate.

Check in DEMO what is the working when you increase the decimal places of the Exchange Rates. Does it impact the Tax Rate and value in documents.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Validation of standard data returns a validation error of 'non balancing amount'
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

In the Data Monitor application, validation of standard data (LC: INR) returns a validation error 'non balancing amount'(attached screenshot). Can someone please comment on why this validation error might occur and how can we fix this?

Thanks & Regards,

Rishav.

entry.title: How to remove default legends in calendar sap ui5?
entry.content: that saved working nonworking are default legendhere today selected working nonworking are default legend. I dont want it anymore. How to remove this?

entry.title: Re: STOCK TRANFERPOSTING ERROR
entry.content:
Hi,

You need to extend material at the storage location 1060 via tcode MMSC.

Regards

entry.title: Re: GST Tax Rate Decimals
entry.content: Hi JItin

entry.title: Re: GST Tax Rate Decimals
entry.content: Hi JItin I found the setting in General Settings Display tab for Percent Decimals but it applies to all Percent field including Discount, will inform User to consider

entry.title: Re: Save filters in Signavio Process Insights
entry.content:
Hi Giuseppe, good news: as depicted in the public roadmap we now have delivered the ability to "Save Filters". Release-to-customer (RtC) has started and after all data centers are updated (GA) you will be able to use this in all editions.

Here is a preview demo:

entry.title: Looking Back at the Success of SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024
entry.content:
Last week, on February 17th, the SAP Inside Track Bengaluru once again proved its mettle as an unparalleled hub for knowledge sharing and networking. This event extended a warm welcome to over 1400 attendees, 120+ speakers & 30+ volunteers offering an enriched platform where learnings were amplified and connections were strengthened.. Personally, it's been the best SAP Inside Track that I've been a part of. This wouldn't have been possible without the hard work and dedication of everyone involved. In this blog post, I will share some of my personal highlights of the event while celebrating the team that made this successful event possible. So, let's get started.

Agenda Highlights

Our event took off with an energy-filled keynote from Sindhu Gangadharan (SVP & MD, SAP Labs India) which illuminated on the pivotal subjects of the SAP Community, Learning, Artificial Intelligence, and more. The event was nothing less than a feast for tech enthusiasts, featuring 56 deep-dive lecture sessions, ~120 speakers, 6 hands-on, and 3 interactive 'Ask Me Anything' booths. These sessions, running on eight parallel tracks, ensured a wide range of topics covered, providing a comprehensive learning experience for all the attendees. I was fortunate to lead the content team where I aided in strategizing and designing the content, working collaboratively with the team. We had 7 tracks of lecture sessions, covering SAP BTP, Application Development - SAP Build, CAP & RAP, Integration, Data Analytics, Automation, SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, SAP UI5, Fiori & Many other functional topics. Check out our agenda here: https://sitblrwebsite.vercel.app/


(Ask me Anything Strategy Corner)

Did I just miss mentioning the Artificial Intelligence?, it was intentional 😉, the highlight of this event is the Business AI, almost 25+ sessions from this event had the flavor of AI in it, in all the tracks. Let's talk about it next 🙂

Advent of AI Discovery Paths:

A significant highlight was the launch of an AI Discovery Paths - a personalized AI journey depending on the attendee’s role selection. This facilitated attendees to select a path best suited to their roles, be it developer, consultant, architect, product manager, or admin. We appreciate Peeyush Chaurasiya for designing this, and thanks to Sindhu Gangadharan for giving us the idea to try this at this event before launching it at the upcoming SAP DCOM.
Check them out here: https://sitblrwebsite.vercel.app/paths

SAP BTP at the Epicenter:


The SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) found significant prominence at this event. There were a total of 34 lecture sessions from SAP Employees, Customers & Partners on topics ranging from Application Development, Artificial intelligence, Automation, Integration and Data-to-Value, and also four hands-on practical interactions, and two specialized 'Ask Me Anything' booths that offered attendees valuable insights from SAP Product Experts. The BTP diamond game, held thrice for customers and partners, made its mark as an engaging highlight.

Feedback that Motivates:

The feedback from the attendees was overwhelmingly positive, clocking an impressive average of 4.56 out of 5 from over 300 entries across all the sessions. The AI sessions, specifically, garnered rave reviews. We also gathered the event experience feedback that received noteworthy scores, with an average feedback of 4.57 from about 200 entries. It was heartening to learn that many attendees found the event to be a valuable platform for learning about SAP BTP, AI, and SAP S/4HANA, among other trending topics, and wanted us to organize these events more often. Of course, there were a few requests for improvements which will definitely consider for the future but considering this as a free event.

Kudos to the Team:

The immense success of the event would not have been possible without the help of all our volunteers dedicated at every step. Their dedication and effort helped us execute one of the best SAP Inside Track events Bengaluru has ever seen. From content curation to track management, their invaluable assistance was present at every stage of the event. Check out this blog post from Shreshtha for more information: <Blog post in process>

Sponsors

A massive thank you to our sponsors, without whom the SAP Inside Track Bengaluru wouldn't have been possible. Their ample support, both financial and logistical, played a crucial part in the smooth running of the event. Not only did they provide us with the necessary backing to host a profuse range of sessions and interactive booths, but some also contributed their own expertise as speakers. Their support was invaluable in making this event a grand success, and we extend our heartfelt thanks to them all. (Primus Techsystems, S2 Integrators, SAP Concur & SAP Press).

Lastly, I want to express my sincere gratitude to Pushpendra Yadav for managing all logistics flawlessly, making the event a truly amazing experience, and Abhishek Chatterjee, the driving force behind this outstanding event. My appreciation extends to PVN Pavankumar for his invaluable support in strategising and reviewing the event’s content agenda. I would also like to express my deep gratitude toward Sindhu Gangadharan for her unwavering support to us in organizing these important events in this region.


(Mahesh, PVN Pavankumar, Pushpendra Yadav, Abhishek Chatterjee)

The End

To sum up, SAP Inside Track Bengaluru was more than just an event - It was a confluence of shared knowledge and networking, and fostering collaborative learning by brining together the SAP Community. I had a great time being part of the organizing & content team, which enabled me to learn to lot and of course the networking 😉 . Looking forward to the upcoming SAP Inside Tracks in this India.

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman
entry.content:
@DanielaZ  if you have an ANAF account with digital certificate, you have to use it to create another user for registering application and the last user will give the possibility to get Client Id and Client Secret.

Check ANAF OAuth procedure for registering application.

Oauth procedura inregistrare aplicatii portal ANAF

entry.content:

Does anyone happen to know what is the maximum limit of entries that decision tables in SAP BPA can be inserted?

Regards,

karthika

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: No entry in table $ for key $ 554C 3401 20230Technical error no. 72
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While Running time evaluation, i got this error

No entry in table $ for key $ 554C 3401 20230
echnical error no. 72
1.09.2023 Processing terminated for EE 

It appeared after i made a new entry on  V_T510S 

 I tried to make a new wage type selection rule since the wage type for overtime worked isnt showing on the payroll run, even thought the overtime quota number is recorded on the TIP table. 

Please help me solve this issue

Thanks, 

Kelvin

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 - Error in mutual linking. [Resources - Linked...
entry.content:
We solved the problem like this,

It is due to inactive warehouses linked to source master data. When we updated the warehouses to active, we were able to provide updates for our linked items.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 - Error in mutual linking. [Resources - Linked...
entry.content: Thank you for your guidance

entry.title: Transaction Type Intercompany - AW01N issue
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

My problem is that while I am using transaction type with trading partner the system automatically translate it in 145.

 

My issue is in Asset Explorer (AW01N), although the value capitalize the asset in the transaction screen in AW01N the value depicted 0,00.

 

 

 

 

 

How overcome this issue?

What is the correct transaction type that SAP Suggest for such cases (with Trading Partner)?

entry.title: How to use attributes.ExampleCustomAttribute in a SAP BPA Process?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have gone through few blogs which suggest the usage of 'attributes.ExampleCustomAttribute' which we get through custom variable.

What I am struggling with is how do i declare custom variable in my SAP BPA Process. 

SAP Build Process Automation 

Regards,

Karthika

entry.title: Is it possible to restrict user learning history in SF LMS?
entry.content: We are in the middle of an implementation and we have implemented security domains only on the items. The current configuration has many different learning admins and they want to restrict the learning history of each user based on the items they have access to. Is this possible?

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM - KPI is inactive error in BPMon
entry.content:
Business Process Monitoring use case has been activated for two business suite systems and we are getting the details in SAP Cloud ALM.

However, when checking for any sub-step in 'Source-to-Pay' process like 'Purchase Requisition Items Created', there is an error pop-up as 'KPI KPPURCH401 is inactive. Please contact your system administrator' or 'KPI KPPURCH301 is inactive...' on any sub-step card. 

I have checked under configuration -> Manage KPIs section -> and see that KPPURCH301 or KPPURCH401 has the data collection turned on for the two business suite systems. 

Please advise.

entry.title: Re: API details needed for posting payment advice through...
entry.content: push

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content:
I am sorry to hear that you have been laid off, but it's great that you are now digging into SAP topics. The SAP Community is a great place to start, e.g. check out our SAP Learning Groups. Let me please also point you to these main components of SAP Community:

  • Topic pages: https://pages.community.sap.com/topics to get to know about SAP products
  • Blog posts: https://community.sap.com/t5/all-sap-community-blogs/ct-p/all-blogs to read experience and knowledge from other community members
  • Discussion Groups: https://community.sap.com/t5/interest-groups/ct-p/interests to get in touch to each other and discuss specific topics
  • What's New: https://community.sap.com/t5/what-s-new/bg-p/whats-new to find all about recent or upcoming news

Enjoy exploring SAP Community!

entry.title: change a concurrent user to a named in BO 4.3
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are on SAP BO 4.3 version, currently we applied CBSL (concurrent user) license in the system.

We have got few named license also, now the audit teams find compliance issue with licenceses.

Therefore management decided to changed few users from Concurrent to named users.

Indeed i found sap note 1680990 which describe the solution.

But my problem is I am not JAva expert, hence dont know how to apply this sap note and change the user license. 

Is there any other way out to solve this issue apart from sap note 1680990

Can some one explain me the procedure for changing the license.

 

Can we apply both concurrent based license and named license in the same system. If it possible

please shed some light, on this.

Quick response is much appreciated.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Syed Maqsood

entry.title: Re: Automatic created Reservation delete
entry.content: Can you please suggest how to remove reservation created against production order with 262 mvt type. Appreciate your input

entry.title: API details needed for posting payment advice through FPAV in FI-CA
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I find below API from SAP business hub for posting payment advice, but these APIs are posting payment advice in FI module, not in FICA module.

API Reference | Payment Advice - Create | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Overview | Payment Advice (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Can someone help us to conclude if we have the API or not.

Regards.

Till

PS: Copied this question from Tech to subject group, as not replied for long.

Original Question: API details needed for posting payment advice thro... - SAP Community

entry.title: Transaction Type Intercompany - AW01N issue
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

My problem is that while I am using transaction type with trading partner the system automatically translate it in 145.

 

My issue is in Asset Explorer (AW01N), although the value capitalize the asset in the transaction screen in AW01N the value depicted 0,00.

 

 

 

 

 

How overcome this issue?

What is the correct transaction type that SAP Suggest for such cases (with Trading Partner)?

entry.title: Re: Introducing the Background Processing Framework
entry.content:
@ajith_urimajalu Without knowing your whole coding and being able to reproduce this issue I can not tell you what is going wrong here.

Best would be to open a ticket on the component that owns the transactional behavior and let them check it: BC-ABA-LA

entry.title: SAP Code Jam in Linz/Austria
entry.content:
Dear SAP CodeJam team,

we would like to host a SAP CodeJam at Develite in Linz, Austria.
Our preferred topic would be the ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.
We are pretty flexible regarding the timeframe in April, Mai, June, September, Oktober and November.
We can provide a location in the TechCenter for 25 people for a working day (e.g. 9:00 - 16:00 CET). Lunch and snacks we can organize via the Launcherie, the restaurant in the same building.

Thanks and regards,
Marcus Lichtenberger

entry.title: Transaction Type Intercompany - AW01N issue
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

My problem is that while I am using transaction type with trading partner the system automatically translate it in 145.

 

My issue is in Asset Explorer (AW01N), although the value capitalize the asset in the transaction screen in AW01N the value depicted 0,00.

 

 

 

 

 

How overcome this issue?

What is the correct transaction type that SAP Suggest for such cases (with Trading Partner)?

 

 

Thanks in advance

 

George

entry.title: CAPM temporal entity update specifying validity time
entry.content:
I have an entity annotated with temporal aspect. That added a VALID_FROM and VALID_TO columns in it. 

To read the record active on a particular date, I use the sap-valid-at=date'yyyy-mm-dd' in query params. 

How can I update a record specifying a date like this ? 

I have made VALID_FROM as part of entity key , but only ID field be the key in service level. 

SAP BTP, serverless runtime

entry.title: Re: “Migrate Your Data” for Storage Bins from Classical EWM to Decentral-EWM on S/4 HANA 1909 using
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I have a question about step 4 - Confirm Mapping Tasks.

In our example, I have almost 20,000 storage bins that I need to confirm. Unfortunately, I can only confirm 20 at a time and not all at once.
Is there a way to select and confirm all of them?

Thank you very much, Daniel

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation: Call Web Service with Destination
entry.content:
Hi Chaitnaya,

I am also using the web services activity with a custom script to attach an xlsx file to a Preliminary Billing Document. But unfortunately its only working with an pdf file like written in the best practices tutorial. The xlsx file is not working. When I try to download and open the xlsx file after attaching it to the PBD it says that the document is damaged. I tried to change the mimetype but its not working. Can you tell me, how to proceed here?

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation: Call Web Service with Destination
entry.content: Hi Mahesh, I am also using the web services activity with a custom script to attach an xlsx file to a Preliminary Billing Document. But unfortunately its only working with an pdf file like written in the best practices tutorial. The xlsx file is not working. When I try to download and open the xlsx file after attaching it to the PBD it says that the document is damaged. I tried to change the mimetype but its not working. Can you tell me, how to proceed here?

entry.title: Beating the Odds: How SAP Skills Shaped Luca’s Career Despite a Struggling Economy
entry.content:
Luca loves a good challenge, whether it’s reaching the next level in his favourite video game, finishing a heavy book, or learning a new skill. “I try to challenge myself whenever possible, to try something new or do something in a different way,” the 30-year-old from Buenos Aires explains. “And sometimes I learn a little bit about myself. And that’s always a pleasure.” However, the circumstances in which he does this are not always the easiest: According to the national statistics authority, the inflation rate in Argentina rose to more than 200 percent last year. With gross domestic product fallen by 2.5 percent last year, and the peso fallen to a record low against the US dollar, the economic prospects in his home country of Argentina look bleak – once again in just a few years. 

Job market for SAP skills is growing 

Thankfully, Luca loves a good challenge. So, when he hit a roadblock with his first job in an office – he completed administrative tasks, “nothing a manager would do”, he says – he decided to do something about it. “There was not much space to grow, so I searched the internet for new job opportunities.” He wanted to combine both of his passions: Interacting with people and leveraging technology. And Human Resources could give him that.

Luca loves the interactive approach of SAP's learning journeys.“As I searched the web for new job opportunities, I found many positions required SAP skills. I did not know anything about SAP at that time, but realized the job market for SAP solutions is growing, so I searched the term online,” he explains. “I found a vast library of information, an online academy, fellow students asking questions, and teachers having fun teaching on many platforms. It was fascinating.” He wanted to become part of that world, part of that community. And he wanted to break into the world of SAP’s HXM. But how could he get started? 

SAP Certification as “a big plus” for his CV 

That’s when Luca came across the digital skills initiative, where SAP gives away 10,000 free certification vouchers and free online learning resources to help people upskill and pivot into tech jobs with an official and in-demand skill validation. He immediately got started. “The learning journeys on the SAP Learning site helped a great deal; their interactive approach is way more manageable and fun than just reading a document,” he says. He claimed his certification voucher shortly after, took the exam, and got his first SAP Certification as an SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP HCM with ERP 6.0 EHP7. And that’s when his starting position suddenly improved. 

“Let me put it this way,” Luca explains, “from the moment I got my certification, I began to apply for relevant positions. I wanted to show that I had the skills they were looking for and if not, I had the capacity to learn them. Two months later I was hired for an entry-level position as a Trainee Functional Consultant.” Luca believes the certification was the most important factor and added a big plus to his CV. “SAP Certification makes a difference. Learning SAP skills and getting certified opens new doors for you.” And since he likes challenges, Luca has already identified his next goal, of course: Getting certified in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core and Payroll.   

Start your own success story     

Did you feel inspired by Luca’s story? Then kick-start your own success story with SAP today. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best on SAP Learning site. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career. We are looking forward to many more great success stories!

entry.title: Re: BTP - SAP Custom Domain Service - Pricing
entry.content:
Hello,

the pricing metric is per registered certificate. When you put all your subdomains in one certificates than you pay for one. When you use a certificate per subdomain then you pay for the amount of certificates you register.

Best,

Jürgen

entry.title: Table sharing in ddic
entry.content: what is use of table sharing in ddic and how to achive

entry.title: ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CONFLICT when saving Draft in RAP
entry.content:
Spoiler
 

Hello,

 

I'm on S/4 Hana 2020 and am having issues with using Draft functionallity in RAP. I have created a really basic application to illiminate any user errors.

The error we get is ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CONFLICT in CL_RAP_BHV_CID_REGISTRY when trying to create or edit a post. Our drafts seems to save ok.

Both me an collegues have tried following the documentation with the same result. Below is our short example program.

Unfortunately we don't have ABAP GIT, so i cannot upload the complete example.

First table def.

@EndUserText.label : 'Favourite List'
@AbapCatalog.enhancementCategory : #NOT_EXTENSIBLE
@AbapCatalog.tableCategory : #TRANSPARENT
@AbapCatalog.deliveryClass : #A
@AbapCatalog.dataMaintenance : #RESTRICTED
define table ymdca_fav_list {
  key mandt             : mandt not null;
  key favouritelistid   : uuid not null;
  userid                : xubname;
  store                 : werks_d;
  description           : char26;
  creadatetime          : timestampl;
  creauname             : uname;
  lchgdatetime          : timestampl;
  lchguname             : uname;
  local_last_changed_at : timestampl;

}

Then the interface definition

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Favourite Lists (Mattias)'

define root view entity YI_MJ_FAV_LIST as select from ymdca_fav_list
{
    key favouritelistid as Favouritelistid,
    userid as Userid,
    store as Store,
    description as Description,
     @Semantics.systemDateTime.createdAt: true
    creadatetime as CreaDateTime,
    @Semantics.user.createdBy: true
    creauname as CreaUname,
     @Semantics.systemDateTime.lastChangedAt: true
    lchgdatetime as LchgDateTime,
    @Semantics.user.lastChangedBy: true
    lchguname as LchgUname,
    @Semantics.systemDateTime.localInstanceLastChangedAt: true
    local_last_changed_at as LocalChangedAt
}

Then the Projection view

@EndUserText.label: 'Favourite List  (Mattias)'
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true

@Search.searchable: true

define root view entity YP_MJ_FAV_LIST as projection on YI_MJ_FAV_LIST
{
    key Favouritelistid,
    Userid,
    Store,
    Description,
    CreaDateTime,
    CreaUname,
    LchgDateTime,
    LchgUname
}

 And finally our behaviour definitions. I've kept them to a minimum with no custom actions 

managed; // implementation in class ybp_i_mj_fav_list unique;
with draft;

define behavior for YI_MJ_FAV_LIST alias FavouriteList
draft table ymdca_fav_list_d
persistent table ymdca_fav_list
lock master
total etag LchgDateTime
authorization master ( instance )
etag master LocalChangedAt
{

  field ( readonly )
  CreaDateTime,
  CreaUname,
  LchgDateTime,
  LchgUname,
  LocalChangedAt;

  field ( readonly, numbering : managed )
  Favouritelistid;

  create;
  update;
  delete;

  mapping for ymdca_fav_list
  {
    Store = store;
    Userid = userid;
    CreaDateTime = creadatetime;
    CreaUname = creauname;
    Description = description;
    Favouritelistid = favouritelistid;
    LchgDateTime = lchgdatetime;
    LchgUname = lchguname;
    LocalChangedAt = local_last_changed_at;

  }


}

 

projection;
use draft;

define behavior for YP_MJ_FAV_LIST //alias <alias_name>
{
  use create;
  use update;
  use delete;
}

entry.title: How to Update / Upload MSME Details for a Vendor(BP)
Output Parameter Determination - Document in multiple languages
entry.content:
Hi,

My client has the requirement to have the invoice (and other documents) send to the recipient in multiple languages. So e.g. when the customer is based in Spain, the invoice has to be send in English and in Spanish.

I have tried to configure this in Output Parameter Determination, but no luck so far.

Is it possible to configure this in Output Parameter Determination? SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 

KR

entry.title: Budget didn't check in PR
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert,

We have implemented Funds management. While creating one PR in SAP, system didn't check for the budget in Fund center and commitment item. I tried to check all the config and derivation rule but couldn't identified anything.

Can you please suggest me why the PR didn't check and what to do in this situation?

 

Thanks,

Shreekumar

entry.title: Re: What is the URL scheme of the FSM iOS app?
entry.content:
A short update: I found the following ones:

  • accom.sap.fieldservicemanagement.ios.release
  • coresuite
  • accom.sap.fieldservicemanagement.ios
  • ac

Unfortunately, not a single one works when setting as an exclusion in Intunes app protection policy.

entry.title: Re: Userexit for tx MIRO on extension LMR1M001 and component EXIT_SAPLMR1M_002
entry.content:
Try to display the account tab, is the exit triggered (is there an account tab in your test) - ref 165635 - Documentation: Enhancement LMR1M001 (MM-IV) 

Else look at available BAdI in 1156325 - BAdIs in the Logistics Invoice Verification environment

is it possible to use this backend function in SAP build process automation? I tried to use it with actions, but it didn't worked.

For example I want to use it to change data in the backend after a task has been approved or rejected.

entry.title: While i try to check the Table level data like MARA/EINA, it shows that transaction does not exist.
Re: Unboxing: Application Backends in SAP Build Apps (Entities)
entry.content: There is a roadmap item for Q4 to allow access to VCF data via API and via other SAP Build products: https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800004334&range=CURRENT-LAST#Q1%202024;INNO=6DB32BEA10581EEEA99DF4809875F128

entry.title: SAP CAL installation missing configuration in advanced mode
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

We are installing SAP CAL on our Azure environment. We would like to specify static Public IP, the DNS and select certificate but no configuration options are displayed in Advanced mode. 

Can you please help finding the root cause ? Is it due to our vnet or subnet config ?

Hello,

ExpertsI'm Developing an Upload Program for BP(Vendor & Customer ) Tcode

But I'm stuck in between while Uploading MSME Details under FLVN00 vendor

Can you anyone Help me out!!!

entry.title: CDS language support VS Code plugin not working
entry.content:
I am in a CAP Java / Fiori Elements project. When trying to edit .cds files, using the "SAP CDS Language Support" plugin with `@cap-js/cds-typer` package, there would be an error saying the code cannot parse the nullish coalescing operator:

/SAPDevelop/Work/ptm-lib-srv/node_modules/@cap-js/cds-typer/lib/cli.js:92
        outputDirectory: [args.named.outputDirectory, args.named.rootDir].find(d => d !== './') ?? './',
                                                                                                 ^

SyntaxError: Unexpected token '?'
    at wrapSafe (internal/modules/cjs/loader.js:915:16)
    at Module._compile (internal/modules/cjs/loader.js:963:27)
    at Object.Module._extensions..js (internal/modules/cjs/loader.js:1027:10)
    at Module.load (internal/modules/cjs/loader.js:863:32)
    at Function.Module._load (internal/modules/cjs/loader.js:708:14)
    at Function.executeUserEntryPoint [as runMain] (internal/modules/run_main.js:60:12)
    at internal/main/run_main_module.js:17:47

I believe nullish coalescing operator is supported since Node 14.0.0, and I am running Node 20.11.0 locally. Could somebody spot the problem here? Or which team should I contact? Many thanks.

entry.title: SAP MII SSCE Can't open configure display parameters window
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a problem with my MDO in SAP MII SSCE. When I drag and drop it to the layout, change visualisation type to grid, I want to add some display parameters. For example:

I open configure display parameters window (it is hard to open at first time, I have to click on icon few times) and choose intrested options (excatlly 24 options), set them and close that window to check if visulisation is ok for me. if not i want to go back to configuration display parameters window, but i can't open it. I just click icon and nothing happend. 

The only option is to delete my MDO from layout and add new one, because this window works only once. There is no problem with odher configuratin windows.   

 

Can you help with that? My sap MII version is 15.4.1.43.

entry.title: Re: Dump in Difference Analyzer when posting differences...
entry.content:
I implemented the note and the problem was solved.

Thank you very much

entry.title: Re: Email Template should not trigger for Auto PR Release Approval in Flexible Workflow
entry.content:
This BAdI is only to define pre-conditions for the steps in the workflow, or whether a particular WF is considered at all. If all of those conditions do not satisfy, then the last one is selected, which is the Auto-Approve.

Email being sent out after approval is independent of whatever this BAdI does. So the actual question is still not answered, how to prevent the email being sent only for the auto-approval case?

entry.title: Re: Enabling Weigh and Dispense in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi Manoel,

I have followed your blogs and configured everything as mentioned in the blog but getting some errors. Can you please help me out on this

entry.title: Re: How to find if maintenance plan is active or inactive...
entry.content: Can we check against plant, active deactivemaintenence plan in this tcode IP17

entry.title: Re: SAPAPIM - Guide to create single API Proxy with multiple Target End Point and capability to chan
entry.content:
Dear Sambaran,

I followed this approach while trying to connect two backend systems.
when I tried to connect first backend system (default one) it works well, routing also processed successfully.

Simillary I tried for second backend system, routing processed, however, it always takes default user credentials.

How to avoid this situation?

 

Thank you
Sateesh

entry.title: Re: STOCK TRANFERPOSTING ERROR
entry.content: THANKS SIR

entry.title: Re: Automatic Upload EBS with specific Import Format
entry.content:
Hi Sonja,

 

on which release are you?

In general the focus from our side is on MBC as the automation of bank statement import. Have you thought of using MBC instead of going with FEB_FILE_HANDLING?

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: How to Set Up the Email Notification for Flexible Workflow in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Thanks @rosydp Rosie,

This helped a lot in setting up the email notifications for a client's flexible WF.

But now there's a new issue. As we've a number of preconditions setup for different types of WFs in the manage WF app, if all of those conditions are not met, the fall back is the predelivered Auto-Approve option, which is as required. However, for this Auto-approve case, they don't want any email to be sent out to the requester.

Any idea if this is possible to setup somehow?

entry.title: Creating Custom BO with upload function like 'Import Supplier Invoices' App in S4hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to create a custom business object with upload function like Import Supplier Invoices App in S4Hana Cloud system.

Is it possible to create that kind of custom business object using Key User (In App) Extensibility or Developer (On Stack) Extensibility using ADT?

Or any workaround exist?

Could you please provide any idea?

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

I created a deletion Flag in S4 for a product using T-Code MM06 and I found that the deletion flag is not transferring automatically to GTS. Can anyone help me with this scenario. 

Regards,

Aditya

I am currently tuning in from Brussels, Belgium.

entry.title: Re: Reconciliation difference must be zero before reconciling[Message 3821-8].
entry.content: where is thread

entry.title: Re: Get dynpro field value in PROCESS ON VALUE-REQUEST.
entry.content: That's correct, dynpfields in an input/output parameter. Refer to the inline documentation of DYNP_VALUES_READ for more information.

entry.title: List of Incoming Payments with penalties per Customer Query
entry.content:
Hi ,

I hope someone can help me, I need to extract the List of Incoming Payments with penalties per Customer.
Do you have any query for me to have this data i need?

Thank you so much

entry.title: Re: STOCK TRANFERPOSTING ERROR
entry.content:
Hello,

Go to MMSC T-Code and add stock 1060 in plant 2000 for this material. It should work.

If not, check in MB52 if You have this material on that special stock "E".

entry.title: List of Incoming Payments with penalties per Customer Query
entry.content:
Hi ,

I hope someone can help me, I need to extract the List of Incoming Payments with penalties per Customer.
Do you have any query for me to have this data i need?

entry.title: Re: STOCK TRANFERPOSTING ERROR
entry.content: The mentioned t code worked thanks

entry.title: Re: Authorization Control for static actions in RAP / ABA...

How could an instance authorization help me with the problem. But how could an instance authorization help me with the problem?

entry.title: Professional Services in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - The Collection
entry.content:
Professional Services in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition supports professional services companies with the digital transformation of their company. With this solution we deliver real-time accounting solutions with in-depth analysis, the right functionality to plan, execute and control profitable projects, the insight to deploy the right resources to the right project at the right time, and sophisticated billing capabilities with advanced revenue recognition.

In this blog, you can find a collection of expert blog posts that relate to Professional Services in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and give you some details about the end-to-end processes of this scenario.

This is a new version, of this existing blog. Due to the migration of the SAP Community, updates will be made here in the future. 

 

 1705 Update1708 Update1711 Update
1802 Update1805 Update1808 Update1811 Update
1902 Update1905 Update1908 Update1911 Update
2002 Update 2008 Update2011 Update
2102 Update2105 Update2108 Update 
2202 Update 2208 Update 
2302 Update-2308 Update 
2402 Update---

Find here more expert blogs on Professional Services in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

From Stefan Walz:

  • An Introduction to Event-Based Revenue Recognition with Customer Projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • Financial Accounting for customer projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Part 1 Real-time insights in project-based service scenario
  • Financial Accounting for customer projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Part 2 Enhanced activity confirmation for service industry – including intercompany margin posting
  • Financial Accounting for customer projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Part 3 professional service industry reporting – including margin per contributing profit center
  • Financial Accounting for service industry in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Part 4 market segment reporting based on flexible profit center hierarchies
  • Intercompany Cost Allocations in S/4HANA Cloud
  • Financial Accounting for project-based sales in S/4HANA Cloud

From Andrew Saunders:

  • Service Pricing Example in S/4HANA Cloud Professional Services

From Tobias Schmidt:

  • Non-Time Related Materials for Project Services

From Ulrich Hauke:

  • Financial Accounting for Customer Projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

From Andreas Hammerschmidt:

  • Project Billing for Customer Projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • Activity Types and Service Materials for Project Based Services and Project Billing
  • External Contingent Workforce for Customer Projects

From Nadia Razzaq:

  • New Staffing Features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Projects, Resource Management 2107

From Panduranga Rao Janga:

  • Converting project working hrs to person day with embedded steampunk extensibility

From Ana Goncalves:

  • Custom Situation Handling Use Case for Professional Services: Unstaffed Resource Requests

From Sven Nachtigall:

  • Alternative entry point for professional services projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
  • The two project control possibilities in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Enterprise projects and professional services projects

 

Where to find out more details on the product?

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud release info
  • Best practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud here
  • Feature Scope Description here
  • What’s New here
  • Help Portal Product Page here

entry.title: Retrieving Data from SAP Business One using Node.js Middleware
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have recently started a project that aims to retrieve data from SAP business one and manipulate it using a nodejs middleware but I didn't find too much ressources to implement the middleware.

I started by learning small things about the SAP Business One platform and learned the basics of nodejs.

I wanna know if there is any resources or methods to build the middleware.

Any help please

entry.title: Re: What is the default character in LSMW for unchanged f...
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

From info on line, it says Space and 0 are the default character for unchanged text and number fields respectively.

Where are they defaulted? I'd like to replace space with "/".

Please kindly help.

Sally

entry.title: Re: Simplifying Destination Configuration with Resource Path in Action Editor
entry.content:
Hi @MikeDoyle ,

With the latest feature release, you can now add the service path during the project creation. You will see a screen like below during project creation to add the service path

entry.title: Re: International Day of Women and Girls in Science
entry.content:
Great talk! Thanks so much for initiating this and for sharing all of your insights, ladies!

I love your story with your child @noravonthenen, and I totally agree! There need to be flexibility and I am glad, we have that at SAP! 🙂

@sheenamk I like the idea of inviting girls into the companies to find out more about it. In Germany, SAP is exactly doing that! SAP is part of the Girls' Day, which is on April 24 this year.  (website is in German). I presented there my job as a Community Advocate the last years. It's a great opportunity for female pupils to come to visit SAP and get to learn different jobs. They get also a tour and can socialize with the presenters during lunch. I love this experience and I am glad to be part of it again this year.

entry.title: Re: Renaming a PDF export file
entry.content: Where in SAP can you set the system to automatically update the naming convention when exporting the document to PDF?

entry.title: Re: Build service failed community edition
entry.content: Hi same error here if you find any solution plese help me to build

entry.title: Manage Dashboards table calculations
entry.content:
Hello experts

 

I am trying to figure out how Manage Dashboards work in SAP DM and I want to add to a table the time it took for a step from a routing to be completed: 

Basically I want to do CompletedTime - StartedTime and display it in a new row in the table. 

How can I achieve this?

 

Thank you
